creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 156433
patch to django tagging

I think the problem is the old version of django-tagging. This may fix it. Ultimately, graphite shouldn't be using django-tagging as it is no longer maintained, at least according to:

https://www.djangopackages.com/grids/g/tagging/

I'll see if I can switch graphite to using another tagging package.
